data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes options to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Presents simplified options and clear call-to-actions.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs for easy access to frequently used features.
data.technical_spec: Larger interactive elements with short accessible paths.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Keeps information chunks to human perceivable quantity.
data.technical_spec: Limits items in menus to 7±2 to match working memory capacity.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs consistent with user expectations formed by other sites.
data.technical_spec: Interface adheres to standard web conventions for consistency.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.technical_spec: Uses proximity to establish relationships amongst interface items.
